title: 「Sentence 比較句 Comparative」句型
titleEn: Comparative Sentences with a Complete Than-Clause

omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject A + verb / be + comparative expression + than + Subject B + auxiliary verb / be

formulas.formula: Subject A + verb / be + comparative expression + than + Subject B + auxiliary verb / be
Subject A + main verb + comparative expression + than + Subject B + do / does / did
Subject A + be + comparative expression + than + Subject B + be

example: This version performs better than previous generations did.
exampleZh: 這個版本比前幾代的表現更好。

examples.en: This version performs better than previous generations did.
examples.zh: 這個版本比前幾代的表現更好。

examples.en: Mia runs faster than Leo does.
The new room is brighter than the old room was.
examples.highlight: brighter than the old room was

meaning.zh: 完整比較子句使用 than + 主語 + 助動詞／be，清楚指出兩個主語在某項表現、程度或數量上的差別。

rules.zh: 一般動詞使用 do、does 或 did 代替重複的動詞。
rules.en: With an ordinary verb, use do, does or did to avoid repeating the verb.
examples: Mia runs faster than Leo does.

rules.zh: 如果主要動詞是 be，便重複適當的 be 動詞。
rules.en: When the main verb is be, repeat the appropriate form of be.
examples: The new room is brighter than the old room was.

rules.zh: 如果句子有情態動詞或其他助動詞，便保留相同的助動詞。
rules.en: If the sentence contains a modal or another auxiliary, retain the same auxiliary.
examples: Ben can swim farther than I can.

rules.zh: 使用完整比較子句時，than 後面要有主語。
rules.en: In a complete comparative clause, put a subject after than.
examples: Olivia explains the idea more clearly than I do.

rules.zh: less 配合不可數名詞；fewer 配合可數名詞複數。
rules.en: Use less with uncountable nouns and fewer with plural countable nouns.

rules.zh: 比較的內容必須一致，than 前後要比較同一項表現或特質。
rules.en: Keep the content of the comparison parallel on both sides of than.

rules.zh: 本課使用完整句子比較，而不只是 than + 名詞。
rules.en: This lesson uses a complete comparative clause rather than only than + noun.

rules.zh: 把 not as…as 等句式改成肯定比較句時，可能需要對調兩個主語的位置。
rules.en: When changing not as…as into a positive comparative, the two subjects may need to exchange positions.

benefits.zh: 清楚說明正在比較哪一項表現，減少意思含糊。
benefits.en: It clearly identifies the performance or ability being compared and reduces ambiguity.

benefits.zh: 使用助動詞代替重複整個動詞部分，令句子更簡潔自然。
benefits.en: It avoids repeating the whole verb phrase by using an auxiliary.

benefits.zh: 把兩項相關資料合併成一個完整比較，讓差別更容易看見。
benefits.en: It combines two related pieces of information into one complete comparison.

benefits.zh: 適合在作文、報告或簡報中解釋數據、研究結果及不同制度或方法。
benefits.en: It is useful for explaining data, research results, systems and methods.

benefits.zh: 讓口語答案清楚交代「在哪一方面更好」，令回答更具體。
benefits.en: It makes spoken answers more specific by stating the exact area of difference.

benefits.zh: 提供另一種自然比較寫法，增加句式變化。
benefits.en: It provides another natural comparative frame and adds sentence variety.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence or pair of sentences using a comparative sentence with than + subject + auxiliary verb.
Preserve all important information in the original sentence.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 比較表達 + than + 主語 + 助動詞 改寫以下句子或句子組合。
答案必須保留原句中的重要資料。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Leo types thirty words a minute. Mia types forty words a minute.
questions.promptZh: 里奧每分鐘打三十個字。米婭每分鐘打四十個字。
questions.answer: Mia types faster than Leo does.
questions.answerZh: 米婭打字比里奧快。
questions.highlight: Mia types faster than Leo does.

questions.prompt: The old classroom was quite dark, whereas the new classroom is very bright.
questions.promptZh: 舊課室相當昏暗，而新課室十分明亮。
questions.answer: The new classroom is brighter than the old classroom was.
questions.answerZh: 新課室比舊課室明亮。
questions.highlight: The new classroom is brighter than the old classroom was.

questions.prompt: Tom does not study for as long as Ben does each evening.
questions.promptZh: 湯姆每晚溫習的時間沒有本那麼長。
questions.answer: Ben studies for longer than Tom does each evening.
questions.answerZh: 本每晚溫習的時間比湯姆長。
questions.highlight: Ben studies for longer than Tom does each evening.

questions.prompt: Amy speaks softly. Nina, by contrast, speaks loudly.
questions.promptZh: 艾米說話輕聲，而妮娜說話的聲量較大。
questions.answer: Nina speaks more loudly than Amy does.
questions.answerZh: 妮娜說話的聲量比艾米大。
questions.highlight: Nina speaks more loudly than Amy does.

questions.prompt: The old phone lasted eight hours on one charge. The new phone lasts twelve hours.
questions.promptZh: 舊手機充電一次可以使用八小時。新手機可以使用十二小時。
questions.answer: The new phone lasts longer on one charge than the old phone did.
questions.answerZh: 新手機充電一次後的使用時間比舊手機長。
questions.highlight: The new phone lasts longer on one charge than the old phone did.

questions.prompt: Which one arrives first? The train arrives at 8:00, and the bus arrives at 8:10.
questions.promptZh: 哪一種交通工具較早到達？火車在八時到達，而巴士在八時十分到達。
questions.answer: The train arrives earlier than the bus does.
questions.answerZh: 火車比巴士早到達。
questions.highlight: The train arrives earlier than the bus does.

questions.prompt: Emma answered seven questions correctly, but Chloe answered only five correctly.
questions.promptZh: 艾瑪答對了七條問題，但克洛伊只答對了五條。
questions.answer: Emma answered more questions correctly than Chloe did.
questions.answerZh: 艾瑪答對的問題比克洛伊多。
questions.highlight: Emma answered more questions correctly than Chloe did.

questions.prompt: The same notebook costs thirty dollars at the small shop and twenty-five dollars at the supermarket.
questions.promptZh: 同一本筆記簿在小店售三十元，在超級市場售二十五元。
questions.answer: The supermarket charges less for the same notebook than the small shop does.
questions.answerZh: 同一本筆記簿，超級市場的收費比小店低。
questions.highlight: The supermarket charges less for the same notebook than the small shop does.

questions.prompt: The dog can jump one metre high. The cat can jump half a metre high.
questions.promptZh: 這隻狗可以跳一米高，而這隻貓可以跳半米高。
questions.answer: The dog can jump higher than the cat can.
questions.answerZh: 這隻狗能跳得比這隻貓高。
questions.highlight: The dog can jump higher than the cat can.

questions.prompt: The yellow car uses eight litres of fuel for the journey. The blue car uses six litres.
questions.promptZh: 黃色汽車完成這段路程需要八公升燃油，而藍色汽車需要六公升。
questions.answer: The blue car uses less fuel than the yellow car does.
questions.answerZh: 藍色汽車使用的燃油比黃色汽車少。
questions.highlight: The blue car uses less fuel than the yellow car does.

questions.prompt: Sara does not read as quickly as Lily does.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉閱讀的速度沒有莉莉那麼快。
questions.answer: Lily reads more quickly than Sara does.
questions.answerZh: 莉莉閱讀的速度比莎拉快。
questions.highlight: Lily reads more quickly than Sara does.

questions.prompt: This winter is not as cold as last winter was.
questions.promptZh: 今年冬天沒有上個冬天那麼寒冷。
questions.answer: Last winter was colder than this winter is.
questions.answerZh: 上個冬天比今年冬天寒冷。
questions.highlight: Last winter was colder than this winter is.

questions.prompt: Jack spent fifty dollars at the market, while Omar spent thirty-five dollars.
questions.promptZh: 傑克在市場花了五十元，而奧馬爾花了三十五元。
questions.answer: Jack spent more money at the market than Omar did.
questions.answerZh: 傑克在市場花的錢比奧馬爾多。
questions.highlight: Jack spent more money at the market than Omar did.

questions.prompt: Compared with the old printer, which prints twenty pages a minute, the new printer prints thirty-five.
questions.promptZh: 舊打印機每分鐘打印二十頁；相比之下，新打印機每分鐘打印三十五頁。
questions.answer: The new printer prints more pages per minute than the old printer does.
questions.answerZh: 新打印機每分鐘打印的頁數比舊打印機多。
questions.highlight: The new printer prints more pages per minute than the old printer does.

questions.prompt: Who arrived first? May arrived at eight o’clock, and Ken arrived ten minutes later.
questions.promptZh: 誰較早到達？梅在八時到達，而肯遲了十分鐘到達。
questions.answer: May arrived earlier than Ken did.
questions.answerZh: 梅比肯早到達。
questions.highlight: May arrived earlier than Ken did.

questions.prompt: Route A takes forty minutes. Route B takes thirty minutes.
questions.promptZh: 路線 A 需時四十分鐘，而路線 B 需時三十分鐘。
questions.answer: Route A takes longer than Route B does.
questions.answerZh: 路線 A 所需的時間比路線 B 長。
questions.highlight: Route A takes longer than Route B does.

questions.prompt: The old plan was simple, whereas the new plan is complicated.
questions.promptZh: 舊計劃很簡單，而新計劃較為複雜。
questions.answer: The new plan is more complicated than the old plan was.
questions.answerZh: 新計劃比舊計劃複雜。
questions.highlight: The new plan is more complicated than the old plan was.

questions.prompt: I cannot lift as much weight as my brother can.
questions.promptZh: 我能舉起的重量沒有我哥哥那麼多。
questions.answer: My brother can lift more weight than I can.
questions.answerZh: 我哥哥能舉起的重量比我多。
questions.highlight: My brother can lift more weight than I can.

questions.prompt: The village receives 500 millimetres of rain a year. The city receives 900 millimetres.
questions.promptZh: 這條村每年有五百毫米降雨量，而這個城市有九百毫米。
questions.answer: The city receives more rain than the village does.
questions.answerZh: 這個城市的降雨量比這條村多。
questions.highlight: The city receives more rain than the village does.

questions.prompt: The cinema was almost full yesterday, but it is only half full today.
questions.promptZh: 電影院昨天幾乎滿座，但今天只有一半座位有人使用。
questions.answer: The cinema was more crowded yesterday than it is today.
questions.answerZh: 電影院昨天比今天擠迫。
questions.highlight: The cinema was more crowded yesterday than it is today.

questions.prompt: The old system was not very reliable. The new system is highly reliable.
questions.promptZh: 舊系統不太可靠，而新系統十分可靠。
questions.answer: The new system is more reliable than the old system was.
questions.answerZh: 新系統比舊系統可靠。
questions.highlight: The new system is more reliable than the old system was.

questions.prompt: Team A scored three goals, while Team B scored only one.
questions.promptZh: A 隊取得三個入球，而 B 隊只取得一個入球。
questions.answer: Team A scored more goals than Team B did.
questions.answerZh: A 隊取得的入球比 B 隊多。
questions.highlight: Team A scored more goals than Team B did.

questions.prompt: I cannot explain the idea as clearly as Olivia can.
questions.promptZh: 我解釋這個概念時，沒有奧莉花那麼清楚。
questions.answer: Olivia can explain the idea more clearly than I can.
questions.answerZh: 奧莉花解釋這個概念時比我清楚。
questions.highlight: Olivia can explain the idea more clearly than I can.

questions.prompt: Sales have risen by twelve per cent this year. They rose by five per cent last year.
questions.promptZh: 今年銷售額上升了百分之十二，去年則上升了百分之五。
questions.answer: Sales have risen more this year than they did last year.
questions.answerZh: 今年銷售額的升幅比去年大。
questions.highlight: Sales have risen more this year than they did last year.

questions.prompt: Ava made two mistakes in the exercise, while Noah made six.
questions.promptZh: 艾娃在練習中犯了兩個錯誤，而諾亞犯了六個。
questions.answer: Ava made fewer mistakes in the exercise than Noah did.
questions.answerZh: 艾娃在練習中犯的錯誤比諾亞少。
questions.highlight: Ava made fewer mistakes in the exercise than Noah did.

questions.prompt: The express train takes forty-five minutes. The bus takes seventy minutes.
questions.promptZh: 特快火車需時四十五分鐘，而巴士需時七十分鐘。
questions.answer: The express train takes less time than the bus does.
questions.answerZh: 特快火車所需的時間比巴士少。
questions.highlight: The express train takes less time than the bus does.

questions.prompt: Room B is not as quiet as Room A is.
questions.promptZh: B 房間沒有 A 房間那麼安靜。
questions.answer: Room A is quieter than Room B is.
questions.answerZh: A 房間比 B 房間安靜。
questions.highlight: Room A is quieter than Room B is.

questions.prompt: Alex can finish the task in four days. Sophie can finish it in two days.
questions.promptZh: 亞歷克斯可以在四天內完成任務，而蘇菲可以在兩天內完成。
questions.answer: Sophie can finish the task sooner than Alex can.
questions.answerZh: 蘇菲能比亞歷克斯更早完成任務。
questions.highlight: Sophie can finish the task sooner than Alex can.

questions.prompt: Daniel remembered eight of the ten details correctly. Grace remembered all ten correctly.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾正確記住十項細節中的八項，而格蕾絲正確記住全部十項。
questions.answer: Grace remembered the details more accurately than Daniel did.
questions.answerZh: 格蕾絲記住細節的準確程度比丹尼爾高。
questions.highlight: Grace remembered the details more accurately than Daniel did.

questions.prompt: Students can find information online in a few seconds, but they often need several minutes when using the old handbook.
questions.promptZh: 學生可以在數秒內從網上找到資料，但使用舊手冊時往往需要數分鐘。
questions.answer: Students can find information more easily online than they can in the old handbook.
questions.answerZh: 學生在網上找資料，比在舊手冊中更容易。
questions.highlight: Students can find information more easily online than they can in the old handbook.

questions.prompt: My old laptop needed thirty seconds to start. My current laptop needs only ten seconds.
questions.promptZh: 我的舊手提電腦需要三十秒啟動，而目前的手提電腦只需要十秒。
questions.answer: My current laptop starts more quickly than my old laptop did.
questions.answerZh: 我目前的手提電腦啟動得比舊手提電腦快。
questions.highlight: My current laptop starts more quickly than my old laptop did.

questions.prompt: Patients waited an average of forty minutes last month. This month, they wait for twenty-five minutes.
questions.promptZh: 病人上個月平均等候四十分鐘，這個月則等候二十五分鐘。
questions.answer: Patients wait less time this month than they did last month.
questions.answerZh: 病人這個月的等候時間比上個月短。
questions.highlight: Patients wait less time this month than they did last month.

questions.prompt: My sister has visited eight countries. I have visited three.
questions.promptZh: 我姐姐到訪過八個國家，而我到訪過三個。
questions.answer: My sister has visited more countries than I have.
questions.answerZh: 我姐姐到訪過的國家比我多。
questions.highlight: My sister has visited more countries than I have.

questions.prompt: The original recipe uses 200 grams of sugar. The new recipe uses 120 grams.
questions.promptZh: 原來的食譜使用二百克糖，而新食譜使用一百二十克。
questions.answer: The new recipe uses less sugar than the original recipe does.
questions.answerZh: 新食譜使用的糖比原來的食譜少。
questions.highlight: The new recipe uses less sugar than the original recipe does.

questions.prompt: The local team trained on five days last week. The visiting team trained on three days.
questions.promptZh: 本地球隊上星期有五天進行訓練，而作客球隊有三天進行訓練。
questions.answer: The local team trained more often than the visiting team did.
questions.answerZh: 本地球隊進行訓練的次數比作客球隊多。
questions.highlight: The local team trained more often than the visiting team did.

questions.prompt: The old bridge could carry vehicles weighing up to ten tonnes. The new bridge can carry vehicles weighing up to twenty tonnes.
questions.promptZh: 舊橋可以承受重達十噸的車輛，而新橋可以承受重達二十噸的車輛。
questions.answer: The new bridge can carry heavier vehicles than the old bridge could.
questions.answerZh: 新橋能承受的車輛比舊橋所能承受的更重。
questions.highlight: The new bridge can carry heavier vehicles than the old bridge could.

questions.prompt: A survey found that teenagers spend three hours a day on online games. Adults spend one hour.
questions.promptZh: 一項調查發現，青少年每天花三小時玩網上遊戲，而成年人花一小時。
questions.answer: Teenagers spend more time on online games than adults do.
questions.answerZh: 青少年花在網上遊戲上的時間比成年人多。
questions.highlight: Teenagers spend more time on online games than adults do.

questions.prompt: A bus journey costs four dollars. A taxi ride along the same route costs forty dollars.
questions.promptZh: 乘搭巴士完成這段路程需四元，而乘搭的士需四十元。
questions.answer: A bus journey costs much less than a taxi ride does.
questions.answerZh: 乘搭巴士完成這段路程的費用比乘搭的士低很多。
questions.highlight: A bus journey costs much less than a taxi ride does.

questions.prompt: The first explanation was not very clear. The second explanation was very clear.
questions.promptZh: 第一個解釋不太清楚，而第二個解釋十分清楚。
questions.answer: The second explanation was clearer than the first explanation was.
questions.answerZh: 第二個解釋比第一個解釋清楚。
questions.highlight: The second explanation was clearer than the first explanation was.

questions.prompt: The old policy affected 500 workers. The new policy affects 1,200 workers.
questions.promptZh: 舊政策影響五百名工人，而新政策影響一千二百名工人。
questions.answer: The new policy affects more workers than the old policy did.
questions.answerZh: 新政策影響的工人比舊政策多。
questions.highlight: The new policy affects more workers than the old policy did.

questions.prompt: The old library attracted about 800 visitors each month. The new library attracts about 1,200.
questions.promptZh: 舊圖書館每月吸引約八百名訪客，而新圖書館每月吸引約一千二百名。
questions.answer: The new library attracts more visitors each month than the old library did.
questions.answerZh: 新圖書館每月吸引的訪客比舊圖書館多。
questions.highlight: The new library attracts more visitors each month than the old library did.

questions.prompt: Under the old system, students needed five minutes to submit their homework. Through the new portal, they need only two minutes.
questions.promptZh: 在舊系統下，學生需要五分鐘提交功課；透過新平台，他們只需要兩分鐘。
questions.answer: Students can submit their homework more quickly through the new portal than they could through the old system.
questions.answerZh: 學生透過新平台提交功課，比使用舊系統時更快。
questions.highlight: Students can submit their homework more quickly through the new portal than they could through the old system.

questions.prompt: The old booking system handled 180 appointments each day. The new system handles 300.
questions.promptZh: 舊預約系統每天處理一百八十個預約，而新系統每天處理三百個。
questions.answer: The new booking system handles more appointments each day than the old system did.
questions.answerZh: 新預約系統每天處理的預約比舊系統多。
questions.highlight: The new booking system handles more appointments each day than the old system did.

questions.prompt: The old light bulbs use sixty watts of electricity. The LED lights use only ten watts.
questions.promptZh: 舊燈泡使用六十瓦電力，而 LED 燈只使用十瓦。
questions.answer: LED lights use less electricity than the old light bulbs do.
questions.answerZh: LED 燈使用的電力比舊燈泡少。
questions.highlight: LED lights use less electricity than the old light bulbs do.

questions.prompt: The previous team completed the same project in six weeks. The current team completed it in four weeks.
questions.promptZh: 上一個團隊用了六星期完成同一個項目，而目前的團隊用了四星期。
questions.answer: The current team completed the project sooner than the previous team did.
questions.answerZh: 目前的團隊比上一個團隊更早完成項目。
questions.highlight: The current team completed the project sooner than the previous team did.

questions.prompt: Rural residents travel an average of twenty-five kilometres to reach a hospital. Urban residents travel five kilometres.
questions.promptZh: 鄉郊居民平均需要走二十五公里才到達醫院，而市區居民需要走五公里。
questions.answer: Rural residents travel farther to reach a hospital than urban residents do.
questions.answerZh: 鄉郊居民前往醫院所走的路程比市區居民遠。
questions.highlight: Rural residents travel farther to reach a hospital than urban residents do.

questions.prompt: In the study, small teams needed two days to make a decision. Large committees needed six days.
questions.promptZh: 在研究中，小型團隊需要兩天作出決定，而大型委員會需要六天。
questions.answer: Small teams made decisions faster than large committees did.
questions.answerZh: 小型團隊作出決定的速度比大型委員會快。
questions.highlight: Small teams made decisions faster than large committees did.

questions.prompt: Applicants usually complete an online licence renewal in ten minutes. At the service counter, they need thirty minutes.
questions.promptZh: 申請人通常可在十分鐘內完成網上牌照續期，但在服務櫃位則需要三十分鐘。
questions.answer: Applicants renew their licences faster online than they do at the service counter.
questions.answerZh: 申請人在網上辦理牌照續期，比在服務櫃位辦理更快。
questions.highlight: Applicants renew their licences faster online than they do at the service counter.

questions.prompt: In the survey, older students usually check names, dates and links before submitting their work. Younger students often check only the title.
questions.promptZh: 在調查中，年紀較大的學生通常會在提交功課前核對名稱、日期和連結，而年紀較小的學生往往只核對標題。
questions.answer: Older students check their sources more carefully than younger students do.
questions.answerZh: 年紀較大的學生核對資料來源時，比年紀較小的學生仔細。
questions.highlight: Older students check their sources more carefully than younger students do.

questions.prompt: During the tests, the previous safety system detected potential problems after eight minutes. The upgraded system detects them after three minutes.
questions.promptZh: 測試期間，上一代安全系統在八分鐘後才偵測到潛在問題，而升級系統在三分鐘後便能偵測到。
questions.answer: The upgraded safety system detects potential problems earlier than the previous system did.
questions.answerZh: 升級安全系統比上一代系統更早偵測到潛在問題。
questions.highlight: The upgraded safety system detects potential problems earlier than the previous system did.
